Aligned testing years: [2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024]

external_random_forest     30         score        9               0.248301                          0.20549                           0.202428                          0.248663             0.042811               0.045873               True             False          1.048779                      1.141550

Interpretation guideline:
- above_random_mean=True means the model beats average random selection.
- above_random_p95=True means the model beats a high-percentile random strategy.
- If the model only beats random mean for larger K, the result may reflect diversification rather than precise top-stock selection.

========== End Profile ==========
